description: Learn how to post a trade advertisement on Binance P2P to buy or sell cryptocurrencies at your preferred prices and payment methods. This guide covers the steps to create an ad, including setting the type, price, trading amount, payment methods, and remarks.
topic_summary: This video provides a step-by-step guide on posting a trade ad on Binance P2P, covering identity verification, ad creation, and management [t=0:00-2:22].
